name: tasky.brief-synth
description: Generate a Why/Know/Done/Next brief for a Task, or a full meeting prep brief for a Meeting. Reads a subgraph from Neo4j (MEETING_SUBGRAPH or single-task neighborhood) and synthesizes via Butterbase AI Gateway (Opus 4.7).

nodes.description: If meetingId is set, run MEETING_SUBGRAPH. If taskId is set, run a task-neighborhood query pulling the 1-hop network around the task. Emit the subgraph as structured JSON.
Assemble the user prompt via lib/prompts/brief.ts or lib/prompts/meeting-prep.ts, feeding the subgraph JSON as context.
Parse the strict-JSON brief and validate the shape.
